policy_evidence.text:
FREENOW  Internal  Policy:  UK  Driver  Retention  &  Recovery  Guidelines  
Section  A:  Compensation  Caps  &  Stacking  
1.  Global  Monthly  Cap:  No  automated  retention  package  may  exceed  £150.00  in  total  
value
 
per
 
driver,
 
per
 
calendar
 
month.
 2.  Credit  Stacking:  A  driver  may  not  receive  more  than  two  (2)  immediate  credits  
within
 
the
 
same
 
24-hour
 
window.
 
If
 
a
 
third
 
issue
 
occurs,
 
the
 
system
 
must
 
escalate
 
to
 
a
 
human
 
City
 
Manager.
 3.  Tier  Multipliers:  Goodwill  credits  (Category:  Churn)  are  strictly  reserved  for  Gold  
and
 
Silver
 
tiers
 
only.
 
Section  B:  Specific  Issue  Resolutions  
1.  Airport  Short  Fares  (SFP):  *  Applicable  only  if  wait  time  >90  mins  and  trip  distance  
<3km.
 ○  GOLD  TIER  CAP:  £25.00  maximum  per  instance.  (Note:  The  AI  must  NOT  
use
 INC-002 (£50)  for  standard  short-fare  recovery;  that  is  reserved  for  
multi-day
 
systemic
 
failures).
 ○  SILVER/BRONZE  CAP:  £15.00  maximum  per  instance.  2.  Technical  &  GPS  Glitches:  *  Maximum  compensation  is  £10.00  per  confirmed  glitch  
(INC-003).  ○  Priority  Support  Access  (INC-004)  should  be  offered  for  recurring  geofence  
issues
 
(>2
 
tickets
 
in
 
7
 
days).
 3.  New  Starters  (Tenure  <3  Months):  ○  Priority  should  be  given  to  Commission  Shields  (INC-006)  rather  than  
direct
 
credits
 
to
 
encourage
 
continued
 
app
 
usage.
 4.  Infeasible  Quests:  ○  If  a  driver  completes  >80%  of  a  Quest  but  fails  due  to  documented  low  
demand
 
(diagnostics
 
confirm
 
<1.5
 
offers/hour),
 
a
 
Goodwill
 
Gesture
 
of
 
£20.00
 
is
 
permitted.
